info.title: Face Transformation
info.description: API reference for Face Transformation on Ace Data Cloud.

face_shape_set.description: Five features positioning (face key points) specific information.

face_model_version.description: Version of the algorithm model used for face recognition.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

mode.description: Detect the mode. 0 is to detect all the faces that appear, and 1 is to detect the face with the largest area. Default is 0

image_url.description: The link to images need to be processed.

face_model_version.description: Version of the algorithm model used by the face recognition service.Different algorithm model versions correspond to different face recognition algorithms, the overall effect of the new version will be better than the old version, it is recommended to use the 3.0 version.

need_rotate_detection.description: Whether to enable image rotation recognition. 0 indicates disabled and 1 indicates enabled. The default value is 0.

post.description: The requested image is located on the five features (also known as face key point positioning), calculating 90 points that constitute the outline of the face, including eyebrows (8 points on the left and right sides), eyes (8 points on the left and right sides), nose (13 points), mouth (22 points), face contour (21 points), and eye [or pupil] (2 points).

image_url.description: The picture after beauty for the image_url.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

image_url.description: The link to images need to be processed.

smoothing.description: The value range is [0,100]. 0 is not skinning, 100 is the highest degree. The default is 10.

whitening.description: Whitening degree, value range [0,100]. Zero is not whitening, and 100 represents the highest degree. Default value 30.

face_lifting.description: Face thinning degree. Value range [0,100]. Zero is not thin, 100 is the highest level. Default value 70.

eye_enlarging.description: The value ranges from 0 to 100. Zero is not big eye, 100 is the highest degree. Default value 70.

post.description: Users upload a face picture (up to the largest five face information in a picture can be processed), accurately locate the five features, to achieve beauty, skin brightening, acne and other beauty functions.

image_url.description: The generated cartoon picture for the age.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

image_url.description: The link to images need to be processed.

gender.description: Select the transition direction, 0: male to female, 1: female to male.

x.description: Face frame top left horizontal coordinate.

y.description: Face frame top left vertical coordinates.

face_rect.description: Face frame position. If not entered, select the face with the largest area in the image or url.

items.description: The references or sources to be used for answering the prompt.

post.description: Users upload a face picture, based on the face editing and generation algorithm, output a face gender conversion picture. Male to female can achieve beauty, light makeup, add bangs and long hair effect; Female to male can achieve the effect of adding a beard and changing short hair.

score.description: Live score, the value range [0,100], according to the threshold interval corresponding to the live score to determine whether it is a remake. Currently, the threshold can be divided into 5,10,40,70, and 90. The recommended threshold is 40.

face_model_version.description: Version of the algorithm model used for face recognition..

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

image_url.description: The link to images need to be processed.

face_model_version.description: Version of the algorithm model used by the face recognition service. Currently, the input support is 3.0.

post.description: Face static living detection (high-precision version) can be used to perform anti-reproduction living detection on static pictures uploaded by users to determine whether it is a reproduction picture.

post.summary: Face swap based on the provided image.

success.description: Indicates if the task was successful executed.

task_id.description: The ID of the imagine task.

image_url.description: The URL of the generated image, if you want to get the raw image use the raw_image_url field.

image_width.description: The width of the generated image.

image_height.description: The height of the generated image.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

timeout.description: The maximum time in seconds to wait for the task to complete. Default is 120 seconds.

callback_url.description: Webhook callback URL for asynchronous notifications.

source_image_url.description: The URL of the source image. The final image will show the same content as the provided image except for the face. Make sure the provided URL points directly to an openable image, not an image embedded in a webpage.

target_image_url.description: The URL of the target image. The final image will show the same content as the provided face. Make sure the provided URL points directly to an openable image, not an image embedded in a webpage.

image_url.description: The generated cartoon picture for the image_url.

post.description: Input a face photo to generate a personalized two-dimensional animation image, which can be used to create personalized avatars, fun activities, special effects applications and other scenes to enhance the experience of social entertainment.
